All ProductsRTK / CORS / Base Station

High-Precision GNSS Receivers for Surveying, Mapping and Construction

TOKNAV GNSS receiver line covers T series RTK rovers, tBase base station receivers and NET660 CORS/base-station receivers for distributors, contractors and system integrators.

16 products Source: GNSS Receiver.pdf

Application Scenarios

Typical buying contexts for this product category, organized for overseas distributors, contractors and system integrators.

Surveying and Mapping

RTK rovers, controllers and accessories for cadastral survey, topographic mapping and daily field stakeout.

T5Lite, T5, T10Pro, T30, T50
Construction Layout

Laser, AR and photogrammetry receiver options for contractors that need faster point collection and layout confirmation.

T30, T40, T50, T50Pro
Base Station and CORS

Base receivers and infrastructure units for correction transmission, monitoring and long-term reference networks.

tBase, NET660, NET660i

GNSS Receivers Lineup

Choose RTK receivers, base stations and CORS hardware by application.
